context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly applies the verification checklist to a draft document, identifies specific failures, and produces a corrected version.

checklist.name: Checklist applied item by item
checklist.description: Response explicitly checks each of the 5 verification checklist items: acronyms defined, opening contains key decision, technical terms translated, action items have owner+deadline, paragraphs scannable.

checklist.name: Specific failures identified with examples
checklist.description: Each failing checklist item is illustrated with a specific quote from the draft.

checklist.name: Corrected version leads with key message
checklist.description: Corrected draft opens with current status, performance gap, and what decision or action is needed for a VP.

checklist.name: All action items corrected to owner+deadline format
checklist.description: Corrected draft fixes all 3 passive action items with named owners and deadlines using [Owner] must [action] by [deadline].

checklist.name: All jargon translated in corrected version
checklist.description: Corrected draft translates OAuth 2.0, Redis Cluster, IAM, N+1 queries, p95, RBAC into plain language.
